'''Nawruun''' was an elderly [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] of the [[Nysshyyyk]] clan from [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==Biography==
Nawruun was [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and taken to the [[Maw Installation]] where he was forced to work alongside other [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]. To keep them in line, the Imperial [[Grodon Lakky|overseer]] there had to continuously beat them into submission. When [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]—led by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]—arrived to capture the Installation in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], Nawruun took the Keeper's [[Power lash|force whip]] and jammed it down the man's throat, [[Death/Legends|killing]] him instantly.<ref name="Champions of the Force" />

He later served as a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] during the [[Battle of the Maw]] Installation aboard one of the Imperial [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] used by the New Republic to battle the ''[[Gorgon]]'' when it arrived to take back the Maw Installation.<ref name="Champions of the Force" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Champions of the Force]]'' {{1st}}
